W-CONCEPTNET-REL.description: Synthetic ConceptNet 5.7 relation paraphrase set — 34 canonical relations with 4-7 surface forms each.
W-CONCEPTNET-REL.notes: SHA is computed at load time via artifacts.workload_sha256() and recorded in each run artifact.

W-LME-S.description: LongMemEval-S subset (Xu et al., 2024). Not yet implemented.

W-MEM0-EXP.description: Synthetic Mem0 v3 export. Not yet implemented.

W-WIKIDATA-PROPS.description: WikiData property labels + English aliases via wbgetentities REST API. Default scale: P1..P500 -> 288 properties with aliases -> 2457 workload pairs. Regenerate with python -m fixtures.generators.wikidata_aliases --max-pid N.
W-WIKIDATA-PROPS.notes: Realistic paraphrase distribution (e.g., 'head of government' has 10 English aliases). Replaces the W-WIKIDATA-100K stub; 100K-scale fetch is multi-hour and unnecessary for current pilot statistical needs.

W-CHURN-30D.description: Synthetic 30-day churn workload with planted regime change. Not yet implemented.

W-LATENCY-ZIPF.description: Zipfian-distributed relation write stream for latency/throughput testing. Not yet implemented.
